textPlain: Obviously there is a lot of work here, but I am a bit confused. If you already have lab code in Julia, Matlab, R, Python, Excel, etc., what is the motivation to use this tool? Is this hot in a specific community?
Pretty sure this is the project github:https://github.com/KDE/labplot

Unfortunately the only database it supports is SQLite, I really wanted to hook this up directly to a database or REST API. Going back and forth between exporting files and importing them into LabPlot is just too much work...
I think that's just a GitHub mirror, the actual development is happening over at the KDE GitLabhttps://invent.kde.org/education/labplot
SQLite is great and there are a few 3rd party REST API solutions available. What's the problem?
